creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Fix: Please find the patch below. It's also available at:

http://norway.ath.cx/~herbert/calcurse_1_7.diff

----------



------------SP79JEhdgkxAR7neZhhWBvhxHGRhXNGeVrh6fY10HIRAViwq
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN deskutils/calcurse.bak/Makefile deskutils/calcurse/Makefile
--- deskutils/calcurse.bak/Makefile	Sat Jan 20 13:17:27 2007
+++ deskutils/calcurse/Makefile	Sat Jan 20 13:17:39 2007
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/deskutils/calcurse/Makefile,v 1.5 2006/10/07 09:06:23 miwi Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=		calcurse
-PORTVERSION=		1.6
+PORTVERSION=		1.7
 CATEGORIES=		deskutils
 MASTER_SITES=		ftp://ftp2.culot.org/culot/
 
diff -ruN deskutils/calcurse.bak/distinfo deskutils/calcurse/distinfo
--- deskutils/calcurse.bak/distinfo	Sat Jan 20 13:17:27 2007
+++ deskutils/calcurse/distinfo	Sat Jan 20 13:17:48 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (calcurse-1.6.tar.gz) = 9c790622c163e664a380334d43d40796
-SHA256 (calcurse-1.6.tar.gz) = b686744c5d61797cc0349fc702764b655d071fcef99ee5c41a078d09ae064e5f
-SIZE (calcurse-1.6.tar.gz) = 353689
+MD5 (calcurse-1.7.tar.gz) = 95029521e6dd0aa58973eb6e24280f41
+SHA256 (calcurse-1.7.tar.gz) = 8f0d7d43714f9c2f22ccbb6545bba1e1deecea06b9012beff130aa1f19665e6c
+SIZE (calcurse-1.7.tar.gz) = 373218
